zh.lifeSummary: 當Captain Robert Hutchins於1584年出生在英國英格蘭賀特福爾時，他的父親Sir Hutchins-15歲，母親Lady Ann Andersen-15歲。他於1610年與Mary Farley在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1648年2月24日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州加斯托享年64歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Captain Robert Hutchins于1584年出生在英国英格兰賀特福爾时，他的父亲Sir Hutchins-15岁，母亲Lady Ann Andersen-15岁。他于1610年与Mary Farley在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1648年2月24日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州加斯托享年64岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可。

meanings: English: variant of Hutcheon , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s; see Houchin .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.description: On December 6, 1606, the journey to Virginia began on three ships: the Susan Constant, the Godspeed, and the Discovery. In 1607, 104 English men and boys arrived in North America to start a settlement. On May 13 they picked Jamestown, Virginia for their settlement, which was named after their King, James I. The settlement became the first permanent English settlement in North America... In 1698, fire struck Jamestown. The fire was evidently started by a prisoner awaiting execution in the nearby prison. The fire destroyed the prison and the statehouse, though many of the public records were saved. In 1699, the government and capital were moved from Jamestown to Middle Plantation, renamed Williamsburg. People continued to live on Jamestown Island and owned farm lands, but it ceased to be a town.
historicEvents.urlTitle: National Park Service - Historic Jamestowne - A Short History of Jamestown

historicEvents.description: The Virginia Company founded the first permanent English colony at Jamestown in 1607. One of the original 13 states (it entered the Union in 1788). Virginia holds an important place in American history, as it was home to many of the founding fathers, including George Washington, Thomas Jefferson, James Madison, George Mason, and Patrick Henry. Four of Americas first five presidents were Virginians. During the Civil War, Richmond, Virginias capital, was the capital of the Confederacy. Today, Virginia is a popular tourist spot where people can visit historic places such as Alexandria, Williamsburg, and Mount Vernon, George Washingtons estate.

en.lifeSummary: When Captain Robert Hutchins was born in 1584, in Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Hutchins, was -15 and his mother, Lady Ann Andersen, was -15. He married Mary Farley in 1610, in Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 24 February 1648, in Jamestown, Virginia, British Colonial America, at the age of 64, and was buried in Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America.

Il est décédé le 24 février 1648, à Jamestown, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Henrico, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique.

ko.lifeSummary: Captain Robert Hutchins(이)가 1584년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Hutchins(은)는 -15세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Ann Andersen(은)는 -15세였다. 그는 1610년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 헨리코에서 Mary Farley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1648년 2월 24일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 자메스타운에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 헨리코에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Captain Robert Hutchins nasceu em 1584, em Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Hutchins, tinha -15 anos e sua mãe, Lady Ann Andersen, tinha -15 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Farley em 1610, em Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 24 de fevereiro de 1648, em Jamestown, Virginia, British Colonial America, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Captain Robert Hutchins родился в 1584 г. в местности хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Hutchins было -15 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Ann Andersen, -15. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Farley в 1610 г. в местности хенрику, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 24 февраля 1648 г. в местности джеместоун, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности хенрику, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика.
